name: Raspberry-Lemon Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen raspberries, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine dry ingredients: 2 cups flour, 1/2 cup sugar, 2 teaspoons baking powder, 1/2 teaspoon baking soda, and 1/8 teaspoon salt.
2. In another bowl, whisk together wet ingredients: 8 ounces lemon yogurt (lowfat), 1/2 cup oil, 1 teaspoon lemon peel (grated), and 2 eggs.
3. Lightly fold the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until combined.
4. Gently stir in the thawed and drained frozen raspberries.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the topping ingredients: 1/3 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons butter, and 1/4 cup flour. Cut the butter into the flour and sugar until crumbly.
6. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
7. Fill lined or greased muffin cups about 2/3 full with the batter. Sprinkle the topping on each muffin.
8. Bake for 18-20 minutes. Allow muffins to cool for 5 minutes before removing from the pan.
